title: Ats more animals
description: This mod adds a ton of new animals to the game, they are all in vanilla style and fit perfectly to the minecraft style
body:
At's More Animals brings a variety of new creatures to Minecraft, seamlessly fitting into the game's vanilla style. From land animals to birds and aquatic life, this mod enhances the world with realistic yet Minecraft-friendly wildlife. Each animal is carefully designed to match the game's aesthetic, making your world feel more alive without breaking immersion. Whether you're exploring forests, rivers, or plains, you'll encounter new animals that add depth and realism to your adventures.



Our 2026 Roadmap

https://atmodstudio.netlify.app



Wiki comming Soon!

Dark Mushroomi 

Tapir (Reworked)



We are currently working on support for Minecraft 26.1 and are at approximately 22% progress. We estimate around 3 more weeks of development remaining.
